completed_tasks.name: Phase 7 — Canvas Workspace UX and Markup Editing Fixes
completed_tasks.notes: All 5 fixes shipped; UAT A-F approved. v1 milestone complete — 9 phases, 25/25 requirements.

remaining_tasks.name: Commit uncommitted post-Phase-7 quick fixes (3 files)
Human verification: Electron window no-show fix
Human verification: Missing PDF modal fix

human_actions_pending.action: Verify Electron window no-show fix: run npm run dev 5+ times in a row (close after each) — window must appear every time
human_actions_pending.context: Fix in src/main/index.ts: idempotent showOnce bound to both ready-to-show AND did-finish-load. Debug file: .planning/debug/electron-window-no-show-on-second-dev-run.md

human_actions_pending.action: Verify missing PDF modal: move the PDF a saved .clmc references, click Open toolbar button, select that .clmc — MissingPdfModal must appear with 'Browse for PDF' button
human_actions_pending.context: Fix: App.tsx passes handleOpenClick as prop to <Toolbar onOpenClick={handleOpenClick} />. Debug file: .planning/debug/missing-pdf-modal-not-appearing.md

decisions.decision: mainWindow.maximize() added before mainWindow.show() in src/main/index.ts
decisions.rationale: App opens maximized on launch — better default for an estimating tool

decisions.decision: overflow: hidden + minHeight: 0 added to canvas wrapper divs in App.tsx
decisions.rationale: Prevents canvas container overflowing its flex parent

decisions.decision: CanvasViewport Stage wrapped in conditional render instead of early return null
decisions.rationale: Prevents null render flash; loading skeleton still shows while displayCanvas/displayPageSize are unset

next_action: 1. Commit the 3 uncommitted post-Phase-7 files. 2. Complete human verification tasks. 3. Run /gsd-complete-milestone or /gsd-new-milestone to start v1.1.
context_notes: v1 fully shipped — Phase 7 UAT closed 2026-05-13. Uncommitted files are post-phase quick improvements made directly after UAT sign-off: maximize on startup, layout overflow fix, canvas conditional render fix. Two debug issues have fixes applied but still await user end-to-end verification.
